note: risk component fixed at 0.5 (no temporal data) — weight reflects noise
interpretation: Acyclicity dominates (w=0.73): cycles directly force co-changes (hotspots). Cohesion second (w=0.17): god classes accumulate changes. Modularity weight=0: community structure does not predict churn independently. Equal weights (0.25 each) may be suboptimal for defect prediction.
